name: Baked Corn Chex'n' Cheese Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Saute green pepper and onion in butter until limp.
3. Beat together eggs, milk, salt, sugar, and pepper.
4. Stir in cheese, corn, sauteed peppers and onions, and 1 1/2 cups cereal.
5. Pour mixture into a buttered 2-quart casserole.
6. Top with remaining cereal.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 45 to 50 minutes or until set.
8. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
